channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 90% Cheaper AI? Microsoft-Backed Chip Startup Says It’s Possible Today
item.description: AI is expensive. This Microsoft-backed chip startup says its can generate AI answers 90% cheaper ... and it's going to get even better over time ...

item.title: 10 Engaging Team Bonding Activities to Boost Collaboration
item.description: Discover 10 engaging team bonding activities designed to boost collaboration and strengthen relationships within your team. Enhance communication and ...

item.title: Practical Enterprise AI Came Of Age At The 2026 World Economic Forum
item.description: This year in Davos, executives from the tech world and beyond focused on the most relevant use cases of AI for solving real-world business problems.

item.title: What Is Personalised Service and How Can It Benefit You?
item.description: Discover the concept of personalised service and learn how it can enhance your customer experience. Explore the benefits of tailored interactions and ...

item.title: CrowdStrike And NordVPN Aim To Make Every Consumer Their Own CISO
item.description: NordVPN taps CrowdStrike threat intelligence to power its Threat Protection Pro feature, bringing enterprise-grade adversary tracking to millions of e...

item.title: Top 5 Loyalty Program Providers Boosting Customer Retention
item.description: Discover the top 5 loyalty program providers enhancing customer retention. Explore how these leading companies can help your business build lasting re...

item.title: What To Watch This Weekend: New Shows And Movies To Stream On Netflix, Hulu, Prime Video, Apple TV And More
item.description: Looking for something new to stream this weekend? Here’s every major new movie and show hitting Netflix, Hulu, Prime Video, Apple TV and more.

item.title: Call Doctors Physicians, Not “Providers,” Specialty Group Says
item.description: A new ACP policy paper says physicians should not be called providers. The term undermines professionalism, ethics, and trust, according to ACP.

item.title: The next generation of AI businesses
item.description: The first generation was built on large models, demonstrating what could be done and powering many tools. The second generation is focused on reducing...

item.title: SBA’s Working Capital Pilot Surpasses $150 Million in Loans for Manufacturers
item.description: Discover how the SBA's Working Capital Pilot has successfully provided over $150 million in loans to manufacturers, boosting business growth and innov...

item.title: New Study Reveals How Trust Shapes Consumer Engagement at Sign-Up
item.description: Discover how trust influences consumer engagement during the sign-up process in our latest study. Learn key insights and strategies to enhance user ex...

item.title: Tip for tap
item.description: There is plenty of unintentional harm in our world. We’ve all been bruised or derailed by someone who had no ill intent. We often respond with intenti...

item.title: Time well spent
item.description: What an admirable goal. Perhaps the overriding goal of all goals. How often do we measure this? Do we even know how? Do the systems we’re in push us f...

item.title: A starting point for the blog

item.title: Process thinking
item.description: Sure, you made it work this time, but will it work next time? Can you teach the method to someone else? Do you have a protocol for what to do when it ...
